title: Deep Stacking — Multi-Level Stacking Architectures
summary: Deep stacking extends the standard 2-level stacking architecture (base models → meta-learner) to 3+ levels. Each level trains on the OOF predictions of the previous level. The Home Credit 1st-place solution (Tunguz team) used a 3-level architecture with 90+ base models. At each level, diversity and OOF correctness are paramount.
